name: Hello Dolly Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 can Eagle Brand or other sweetened condensed milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the margarine.
2. Spread the melted margarine evenly in a 6 x 9 baking pan.
3. Layer the crushed vanilla wafers over the melted margarine.
4. Sprinkle chocolate chips, chopped pecans, and coconut on top of the vanilla wafers.
5. Pour the sweetened condensed milk over the toppings.
6. Place the pan in an oven preheated to 350°F (175°C).
7. Bake for 30 minutes.
8. Turn off the heat and let the bars cool before cutting.
Note: You can add peanut butter chips to this recipe for a different flavor experience.
